topics.title: Whack Pack Show Review and Fan Interaction
topics.summary: The studio discusses the recent Whack Pack show performances, listener feedback regarding specific segments, and potential future fan engagement events.

topics.title: Jackie Puppet Production and O.J. Simpson Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the development of a scripted drama featuring the Jackie puppet, followed by a series of clips regarding the O.J. Simpson case and internal jokes about the show's cast.

topics.title: Radio Industry Trends and Talent Retention
topics.summary: The studio discusses the challenges of terrestrial radio management, the distinction between comedians and professional broadcasters, and the potential departure of a long-time host.

topics.title: Media Coverage and Legal Risks
topics.summary: The studio discusses the impact of tabloid reporting on personal lives, the distinction between actionable and non-actionable claims, and the investigative process behind a new book regarding Anna Nicole Smith's medical history.

topics.title: Anna Nicole Smith Investigation and Book Details
topics.summary: The studio discusses the details of Rita Cosby's book regarding Anna Nicole Smith, including allegations of a secret deal between Larry Birkhead and Howard K. Stern.

topics.title: Brad Garrett Interview and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with Brad Garrett, who discusses his career success, a confrontation with paparazzi in Malibu, and his amicable co-parenting relationship with his ex-wife.

topics.title: Brad Garrett and Ray Romano Discuss Career and
topics.summary: The studio features a candid conversation between Brad Garrett and Ray Romano regarding their personal lives, performance fees in Las Vegas, and the transition to solo television projects.

topics.title: Chevy Chase on SNL and Marriage
topics.summary: The studio features Chevy Chase discussing his history with Saturday Night Live, his past marriages, and a charity auction for environmental causes.

topics.title: Reconciliation with Chevy Chase
topics.summary: The studio explores the long-standing feud between Howard Stern and Chevy Chase, detailing their eventual reconciliation and the details of an upcoming charity auction.

topics.title: Pat Monaghan Solo Record and Marriage
topics.summary: The studio features Pat Monaghan discussing his new solo record, the inspiration behind his lyrics about his wife, and the collaboration with his new band members.

topics.title: Pat Monahan Performance and Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a musical performance by Pat Monahan, who discusses his new solo album, his past band experiences, and a facial scar from a car accident.

topics.title: Celebrity Rumors and Emmy Awards Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including celebrity rumors involving Carmen Electra and Joan Jett, upcoming news segments regarding military deployments and local restaurant updates, and critiques of the recent Emmy Awards broadcast.

topics.title: Match Game Nostalgia and Public Hygiene
topics.summary: The studio explores memories of the television show Match Game, discusses a planned boxing match between Kid Rock and Tommy Lee, and examines statistics regarding public restroom hygiene.

topics.title: Public Hygiene and Media Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses public restroom etiquette, a lawsuit involving a massage parlor, Barry Manilow's media appearances, and various rumors regarding Howard Stern's personal life.

topics.title: News Segment Summaries
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including celebrity news regarding Britney Spears and Rosie O'Donnell, the NASA space program, legal proceedings for several individuals, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
